docs.title: TimeSeriesEconPy
docs.text:
A time-series language for macroeconomics, ported from TimeSeriesEcon.jl.

Pre-alpha

The package is in M0 (repo skeleton). No public API yet. This site exists so the build pipeline is wired up; real content arrives during M1.

docs.title: What this site will contain (M1+)
docs.text:
• Getting started — install, first TSeries, plot, save.
  • Concepts — frequencies, MIT, TSeries, MVTSeries, Workspace.
  • Guides — frequency conversion, pandas/polars interop, plotting backends.
  • API reference — auto-generated from docstrings.
  • Migration — coming from pandas, coming from TimeSeriesEcon.jl.
